articles.title: Hyperliquid pulls back from record highs as Arthur Hayes exits position shy of $150 price target
articles.description: The crypto veteran blamed macro risks and AI mania for taking profits, drawing backlash from traders for selling well below his recent bullish forecasts.

articles.title: Waymo’s spent robotaxi batteries will be used as grid storage
articles.description: The company announced a deal with B2U Storage Solutions to repurpose the battery packs as Waymo pulls them off the road.

articles.title: Is Silicon Valley ready to put robots in people’s homes? Hello Robot is.
articles.description: The California startup released the fourth-generation of its home assistance robot, Stretch.

articles.title: Crypto for Advisors: The crypto due diligence questions you forgot to ask

articles.description: Strategy’s Bitcoin paper loss tops $11 billion as Saylor pointed to ETF outflows and AI infrastructure spending as factors pressuring BTC.

articles.title: Why tokenization is an ETF-style market structure revolution
articles.description: The current tokenization dialogue and pattern resemble ETFs’ early days, which ultimately transformed into a $10+ trillion market, Lie argues.

articles.title: Apple touts $1.4 trillion in App Store billings and sales, 90% without a commission
articles.description: Apple's App Store generated $1.4 trillion in sales, up from $1.3 trillion last year, with $149 billion in sales for digital goods.

articles.title: Apex, Archax join Goldman Sachs tokenized real estate fund project
articles.description: Apex Group is providing fund services for a tokenized real estate fund using Goldman Sachs’ GS DAP platform.

articles.title: Ripple-linked XRP sinks 7% to four-month lows

articles.title: Arthur Hayes dumps HYPE, NEAR as he warns of AI IPO wave
articles.description: Arthur Hayes said he dumped his HYPE and NEAR holdings after warning markets may peak before September and AI IPOs could drain liquidity.

articles.title: Coinbase launches pre-IPO markets, starting with Elon Musk’s SpaceX
articles.description: Coinbase launches pre-IPO markets starting with SpaceX, offering non-US users perpetual futures tied to private company valuations amid rising competition.
